title: Gooey British Bangers Mash
description: A post-workout British dish featuring bangers and mash with a gooey twist, perfect for a low-carb friendly meal after a workout.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the bangers and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the bangers to a plate and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mashed cauliflower to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and oil.
Season with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Return the bangers to the skillet and stir to combine with the cauliflower mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with grated cheddar cheese.
Dot the top with butter and place under the broiler until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
